name: Wednesday's Chili (Wendy's Chili)
recipeIngredient: 1 can French onion soup (not creamy) (10 oz.)
1 can Red kidney beans, undrained (21 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the French onion soup in a blender.
2. Add the blended soup to the pan where you are browning the meat.
3. Add the remaining ingredients and let simmer.
